title: Aegon’s Conquest: The Beginning of Fire #got #shorts
description: After the Doom of Valyria, one house remained. Aegon Targaryen did not flee history—he rewrote it with fire and blood. This is how Westeros was conquered. #Targaryen #AegonTheConqueror #GameOfThrones #Shorts

scenes.narration: After Valyria fell, the world believed the age of dragons had ended—but one man had other plans.
scenes.image_prompt: Aegon Targaryen standing before a massive dragon on Dragonstone cliffs, stormy sky, dark fantasy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Aegon Targaryen was not the strongest ruler—but he possessed something no kingdom could withstand.
scenes.image_prompt: Aegon with Balerion the Black Dread looming behind him, massive scale, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Three dragons—Balerion, Vhagar, and Meraxes—each one capable of burning armies into ash.
scenes.image_prompt: three dragons flying in formation across a dark sky, fire trailing behind them, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: At the time, Westeros was divided into kingdoms that fought endlessly, never expecting what was coming.
scenes.image_prompt: map of Westeros split into seven kingdoms with war banners clashing, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Aegon did not ask for loyalty—he demanded submission, offering a choice between fire and survival.
scenes.image_prompt: Aegon on dragon overlooking kneeling lords, flames behind him, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Those who resisted were burned, their castles melted into symbols of defeat and warning.
scenes.image_prompt: castle melting under dragonfire, stone turning to molten ruin, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Field of Fire became legend, where entire armies vanished beneath dragonflame in moments.
scenes.image_prompt: massive battlefield engulfed in dragonfire, soldiers disappearing in flames, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: One by one, the kingdoms fell—not through diplomacy, but through overwhelming force.
scenes.image_prompt: crowns falling and banners collapsing as dragons fly overhead, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: From the ashes of conquest, Aegon forged a single throne to rule them all.
scenes.image_prompt: Iron Throne forming from melted swords under dragonfire, cinematic glow, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Seven Kingdoms were united not by peace—but by fear, fire, and the return of dragons.
scenes.image_prompt: Aegon seated on the Iron Throne with dragon shadow behind him, epic final frame, vertical 1080x1920
